name: Angelica's Chaotic Hardcore School
short_description: Angelica's Chaotic Hardcore School is an Indie Horror Game inspired by Baldi's Basics in Education & Learning, featuring a young girl named Emily in a Chaotic School with 5 different floors. From Solving Math Problems to discovering new Science Experiments. Different Knowledge is Required!
detailed_description:
Welcome to the world of William's Curse!
You wake up as Emily, a young girl trapped in a strange and crazy school. To escape, you must collect notebooks on every floor, escape from teachers, and face William — a bad teacher who is controlling everyone’s minds.

Each floor has different subjects and psychopath teachers. On the last floor, you’ll have to beat William to save yourself, your friend Helpscreen, and the school staff.

The game has different difficulty levels:

  • Lil Puss Mode: Great for new players. No threats, lots of light, and you can explore without danger.

  • Boi Difficulty: Simple questions and slow teachers. Good for learning the basics.

  • Default Difficulty: A normal challenge. Questions are a bit harder but not too crazy.

  • Brainiac Difficulty: Very hard! Tough questions, fast teachers, and special achievements for beating each level.

  • Hardcore Mode: Choose any difficulty, but you have to finish all five floors without losing once to move on.

    Jump into the game — Emily’s life is in your hands!

English*, Italian
*languages with full audio support
